codeReview.summary: The commit adds the new region and language query tables plus tests, but the production default fetch path still ignores them. As a result, normal ingestion continues to run only the original thematic profiles and does not gain the intended global-coverage targeting.

issues.description: fetchLiveNews() still falls back to GDELT_QUERY_PROFILES when no explicit queries are supplied, even though getDefaultQueryProfiles() was introduced for the new region/language coverage. Both refreshSnapshot() and the default client/server fallbacks call fetchLiveNews() without a queries argument, so the new sourcecountry:/sourcelang: profiles are dead code in the main ingest path.
issues.suggestedFix: Use getDefaultQueryProfiles() for the no-query default path (or otherwise merge GDELT_REGION_QUERIES and GDELT_LANGUAGE_QUERIES into the normal ingest query set), then add a regression test that asserts the default profile count includes the advanced query groups.

summary: Fail. Advanced GDELT query definitions were added, but default ingestion never uses them, so the feature does not deliver its intended runtime behavior.
